rationale: Builds directly on the best late quant-aware LR rebalance script, but changes only the final size-allocation policy. Instead of always spending FP16 budget on the tied embedding and then greedily trying extra penultimate attention tensors, this run treats the embedding and penultimate Q/K/V as a tiny exact-budget search: it scores each tensor by actual int8 roundtrip distortion, enumerates all subsets that fit the true 16MB compressed cap, and keeps the subset with the highest recovered quantization error. I also remove the now-unused qmeta bookkeeping to keep the script lean and preserve the 1500-line limit.
title: Budgeted Final FP16 Knapsack Reallocation
